definition: Right to know that AI is being used in a decision or interaction.
Right to a meaningful explanation of an AI-driven decision.
Right to opt out of AI processing, profiling, or automated decision-making.
Right to appeal or challenge an AI-driven decision.
Right to deletion of personal data used in or produced by AI systems.
Right to human review or override of an AI decision.
Right not to be subject to discriminatory AI decisions or outcomes.
Right to receive personal data in a portable, machine-readable format.
Right to access personal data processed by or used in AI systems.
Right to correct, rectify, or update inaccurate or incomplete personal data processed by AI systems.
